data.title: Four.Meme: Daily revenue reaches $1.48 million, with over 48,000 tokens issued in 24 hours
data.description: Four.Meme posted on the X platform that the platform issued over 48,000 tokens in the past 24 hours, with daily revenue reaching $1.48 million, 2.6 times that of pump.fun during the same period.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 121,000 USDT with a 1.18% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 14:47 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 121,000 USDT and is now trading at 120,976.289063 USDT, with a narrowed 1.18% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Peru’s BCP launches cryptocurrency financial platform Criptococos
data.description: Banco de Crédito del Perú (BCP), Peru's largest bank and comprehensive financial services provider, announced the launch of Criptococos, Peru's first cryptocurrency financial platform, to enable the secure purchase and management of crypto assets. The platform is part of a pilot project authorized by the Superintendent of Banks, Insurances and Pension Funds (SBS) of Peru and is supported by BitGo. (Businesswire)

data.title: Watt Protocol's official X account was hacked and a phishing tweet was posted
data.description: According to Scam Sniffer, Watt Protocol's official account "X" has been compromised, with attackers using it to post phishing tweets. Users are advised to remain vigilant and avoid clicking on related links or performing any interactive actions.

data.title: Crypto stocks saw mixed gains and losses at the opening of the US stock market, with BitMine falling 1.96%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.1%, the S&P 500 rose 0.1%, and the Nasdaq rose 0.01%. The crypto sector saw mixed gains and losses, with BitMine down 1.96%, Coinbase up 3.68%, Strategy down 0.98%, Tron up 4.36%, and Circle up 0.53%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, including US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: The Monad airdrop claim portal will open on October 14th
data.description: Monad announced on the X platform that the airdrop claim portal will open on October 14 (Tuesday).

data.title: Grayscale Transfers 3,701 ETH to Centralized Exchange
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, Grayscale has transferred 3,701 ETH, valued at $16.3 million, to a centralized exchange (CEX) address. This transaction was identified through monitoring by lookonchain.

data.title: US-listed SOL Treasury firm DFDV launches weekly options trading on the Chicago Board Options Exchange
data.description: DeFi Development Corp., a US-listed SOL treasury company, announced that weekly options on its stock have officially launched for trading on the Chicago Board Options Exchange (CBOE). The launch of weekly options will reportedly provide investors with more flexible hedging opportunities and short-term strategy tools, complementing the existing monthly options product. Parker White, the company's Chief Investment Officer and Chief Operating Officer, stated that the launch of weekly options is a significant milestone for DFDV, providing investors with a new way to interact with stocks and adding derivative tools for short-term strategies. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE)

data.title: Xiao He, a customer service representative of Whale Trading with a 50% win rate, made a profit of $380,000 in 28 minutes.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale trading agent, Xiao He, made a profit of $380,000 in 28 minutes. From 7:47 PM to 8:06 PM, he bought $268,000 at an average price of $0.0152. Xiao He: 8:10 PM: Binance Alpha officially launched. Xiao He: 8:10 PM to 8:15 PM: He liquidated his position in batches at an average price of $0.0367. This is a new address created yesterday. It withdrew 50 BNB from OKX as initial funding. It only traded with Gorilla and Xiao He, with a 50% win rate.

data.title: DeFi Development Announces the Launch of DFDV JP, a Japanese Treasury Project on Solana
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Solana treasury company DeFi Development has announced a partnership with Superteam Japan to launch DFDV JP, reportedly Japan’s first Solana-focused digital asset treasury project. DeFi Development previously launched DFDV Korea in South Korea. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BMNR Stock Declines Amid Criticism of Digital Asset Treasury Model
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, BMNR shares fell by 3.55% during trading, reducing its market capitalization to $16.5 billion. Kerrisdale Capital, a notable short-selling firm, has announced its short position on Bitmine, a company involved in Ethereum treasury reserves. Kerrisdale Capital criticized the Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) model, describing it as unoriginal and losing its appeal. The firm highlighted that the market is saturated with similar projects, leading to a collapse in premium valuations. The ability to enhance the per-share Ethereum content by issuing stocks above net asset value (NAV) is diminishing.

Companies pursuing the 'crypto asset treasury strategy' have collectively aimed to raise over $100 billion, undermining the scarcity that initially supported high premiums. Currently, many of these companies' stocks are trading near or below their net asset value, indicating a stagnation in their self-sustaining mechanisms and a breakdown of their models.

data.title: Decentralized AI studio Yuma launches asset management division and secures $10 million in investment from DCG
data.description: Bittensor, the development studio and accelerator for the decentralized artificial intelligence (deAI) network Bittensor, founded by Digital Currency Group's Barry Silbert, has launched its asset management arm, Yuman Asset Management, to provide institutional and accredited investors with convenient access to the deAI ecosystem. Yuman Asset Management has also reportedly received a $10 million anchor investment from DCG and launched two fund strategies investing in subnet tokens. (CoinDesk)

data.title: A whale withdrew 18.9 BNB from CEX and bought 2.51 million WBULL
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, about an hour ago, a whale withdrew 18.9 BNB from the centralized exchange MEXC and bought 2.51 million WBULL.

data.title: State Street: Most Institutional Investors Expect Digital Asset Exposure to Double by 2028
data.description: State Street's 2025 Digital Asset Outlook report shows that more than half of the institutional investors surveyed expect their digital asset exposure to double in the next three years, and 60% plan to increase their digital asset allocation within a year. The survey shows that tokenized private markets are seen as the first major wave of blockchain adoption, with the tokenization of private equity and fixed income most likely to be the starting point. By 2030, the majority of respondents expect 10% to 24% of their total portfolio to be tokenized. Transparency and operational efficiency are the main factors driving this shift. More than half of the respondents believe that improved asset data visibility is a key advantage, and nearly half expect the adoption of digital asset infrastructure to save at least 40% of costs. Currently, 40% of institutions have established dedicated digital asset departments. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Kerrisdale Capital Short-Sells Bitmine Amid Declining DAT Model
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Kerrisdale Capital, a well-known short-selling firm, has announced its decision to short-sell the stocks of Bitmine, a company involved in Ethereum treasury reserves. Kerrisdale Capital criticizes the Digital Asset Treasury (DAT) model, describing it as mundane and lacking innovation. The firm highlights that the market is saturated with similar projects, leading to a collapse in premiums and diminishing the ability to enhance per-share Ethereum content through stock issuance above net asset value (NAV).

Companies pursuing the 'crypto asset treasury strategy' have collectively aimed to raise over $100 billion, undermining the scarcity that initially supported high premiums. Currently, many of these companies' stocks are trading at or below their net value, with self-reinforcing mechanisms stalling and models beginning to crumble.

MicroStrategy (MSTR), one of the earliest DAT companies, has seen its premium drop from 2–2.5 times its net value to approximately 1.4 times. This decline is attributed to unpopular financing and policy fluctuations, which have eroded market confidence. Bitmine (BMNR) is experiencing a continuous decrease in its premium, with expectations of further decline to match or fall below its net value. As premiums decrease, the rate of per-share Ethereum appreciation slows, potentially dropping below 1. Currently, its market value to net value ratio (MNav) stands at about 1.4 times, indicating over 40% potential downside.

data.title: Figment Selected as Staking Partner for Grayscale's Ethereum ETP and Solana Trust
data.description: According to PANews, Figment, a provider of institutional staking services, has been chosen as the staking partner for Grayscale Investments. This partnership marks Grayscale's first launch of Ethereum ETP and Solana Trust staking services in the United States.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Bensont: Budget report will be released after government shutdown ends
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Benson said the regulatory framework is "too restrictive" and that the fiscal budget report will be released after the government shutdown ends, and the U.S. deficit-to-GDP ratio will drop significantly in fiscal year 2025. (Jinshi)

data.title: Falcon Finance Completes US$10 Million Strategic Round of Financing, Led by M2 Capital
data.description: Falcon Finance has completed a $10 million strategic round of financing, led by UAE venture capital firm M2 Capital and participated by Cypher Capital. It is reported that Falcon will accelerate its global roadmap, focusing on expanding fiat currency channels, ecosystem partnerships, and enhancing the resilience of its universal mortgage model.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 1,260 USDT with a 3.52% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 13:56 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 1,260 USDT and is now trading at 1,259.780029 USDT, with a narrowed 3.52% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: A Hyperliquid whale's private key is suspected to have been stolen, and the current loss has exceeded $20 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, a Hyperliquid whale wallet closed out a $16 million long position in HYPE approximately 11 hours ago and sold 100,000 HYPE (approximately $4.4 million). The reason appears to be a compromise of its private key, which completely wiped out its account: approximately $17 million in funds were stolen from its Hyperliquid account; approximately $3.1 million in assets deposited in the Plasma Syrup Vault (liquidity pool) were also stolen. After the attack, the hacker transferred all stolen assets, converting the stolen USDC into DAI and transferring them to two new wallets, where the funds are currently stored. The hacker also transferred $3.11 million worth of MSYRUPUSDP to another new wallet.
